Variables.Name: ExportRootScope
Variables.Description:
The root scope of objects to be exported, only used if PPF_ExportsNotFullyQualfied is set
	  Objects being exported that are contained within ExportRootScope will use just their name instead of a full path

Variables.Name: FormatExtension
Variables.Description:
The root scope of objects to be exported, only used if PPF_ExportsNotFullyQualfied is set
	  Objects being exported that are contained within ExportRootScope will use just their name instead of a full path
	 
	 File extension to use for this exporter

Variables.Name: PreferredFormatIndex
Variables.Description: Index into FormatExtensionFormatDescription of the preferred export format.

Variables.Name: TextIndent
Variables.Description: Current indentation of spaces of the exported text

Variables.Name: bText
Variables.Description: If true, this will export the data as text

Variables.Name: bSelectedOnly
Variables.Description: If true, this will export only the selected objects

Variables.Name: bForceFileOperations
Variables.Description: If true, this will force the exporter code to create a file-based Ar (this can keep large output files from taking too much memory)
